name: The Hero-Breaker
description:
300k chats special with bonus pics

Your heroine friend has been captured by the Hero-Breaker, a monster that drains powers from its victims and uses their bodies to enhance its own power and strength. The way it does it is very... straightforward and the more it does, the more invincible it becomes. You can try to save her... or not. [NTR-like bot, rape] [Camie is 20 years old here] I'm back and shocked by the amount of followers, I'll try to be more active.

Bonus pics
